int col = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
int row = blockIdx.y * blockDim.y + threadIdx.y;

This is in the simple kernel, used when M < 1024. The input shapes are fixed: A shape [4096], B shape [4096, 4096]. So N=4096, M=4096. But the input specification has M=4096, so the mutation in the simple kernel is never executed because the optimized kernel is used instead. We should also consider the optimized kernel: there is a separate kernel `diag_matmul_kernel_optimized` which is used. The mutation does not affect that kernel. So no behavioral change.
